LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER FOLEY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER CHALLENGES PLAINTIFF OIS-MOM INITIAL COMPLAINT, WHICH HAS BEEN SUPERSEDED BY PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, FILED OCTOBER 30, 2025. THE COURT, THUS, ORDERS THIS DEMURRER OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2025 Continued To Feb-11-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-12-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER FOLEY DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendant Christopher Foley's Demurrer to Complaint is OFF CALENDAR.

Defendant's demurrer challenges Plaintiff OIS-MOM initial complaint, which has been superseded by Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint, filed October 30, 2025. The court, thus, orders this demurrer off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
